compiled_state.title: Update sprint/SKILL.md — Manual-Pause Phase and awaiting_* filter
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Implementation Notes
Modify plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md (LLM instruction file — structural boundary tests only per behavioral-testing-standard.md Rule 5).

### Change 1: Design-Blocked Story Filter (Phase 2)
In the existing Design-Blocked Story Filter section, after the design:awaiting_import check, add:

  If planning.external_dependency_block_enabled=true (read via config):
    Check for manual:awaiting_user tag using TAG_MANUAL_AWAITING_USER from planning-tags.conf
    If present: log "Story <id> tagged manual:awaiting_user — deferring to manual-pause handshake."
    Add to awaiting_manual_stories list (do not add to autonomous batch)
    Do NOT add this story to needs-planning list

### Change 2: Topological Sort for Manual Stories
After layer stratification, add a Manual Story Sort step:
  1. Identify all stories with manual:awaiting_user tag from awaiting_manual_stories list
  2. Sort so that manual stories appear BEFORE their transitive autonomous dependents
  3. If a manual story M blocks autonomous story A blocks story B: surface M before both A and B
  4. Cycle detection: if M1 and M2 are both manual:awaiting_user and M1 blocks M2 and M2 blocks M1, log "CYCLE_DETECTED: manual stories <M1> and <M2> have mutual dependency" and escalate to user

### Change 3: New Manual-Pause Phase (between Phase 3 and Phase 4)
Add new phase section "Phase 3.5: Manual-Pause Handshake" that runs ONLY when:
  - All autonomous tasks have been dispatched AND completed (or there are no autonomous tasks in this batch)
  - AND awaiting_manual_stories list is non-empty
  - AND planning.external_dependency_block_enabled=true

Phase 3.5 steps:
  1. Write sorted manual story list to temp JSON file (format per sprint-manual-drain.sh interface)
  2. Call: .claude/scripts/dso sprint-manual-drain.sh <json-file>  # shim-exempt: internal orchestration script
  3. Parse exit code:
     - 0: all manual stories handled, proceed to Phase 4 (or Phase 5 if no autonomous tasks remain)
     - 1: skip propagation applied, proceed but log skipped stories
     - 2: re-prompt (should not happen at orchestrator level — script handles re-prompt internally)
  4. After handshake: run sprint-next-batch.sh again to pick up any autonomous stories that were unblocked

### Change 4: Step 10a completion-verifier path
In Step 10a, add note: when story has manual:awaiting_user tag, completion-verifier reads the MANUAL_PAUSE_SENTINEL comment rather than re-verifying the manual step. No orchestrator action required — completion-verifier.md handles this autonomously.

## TDD Exemption
Exemption criterion: task modifies only non-executable LLM instruction files (SKILL.md). Unit Exemption Criterion 3: "static assets / non-executable instruction files". Structural boundary tests verify referential integrity and shim compliance.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] sprint/SKILL.md references sprint-manual-drain.sh via shim pattern (not direct path)
  Verify: grep -q "sprint-manual-drain.sh" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md && grep "sprint-manual-drain.sh" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md | grep -q "shim-exempt\|\.claude/scripts/dso"
- [ ] sprint/SKILL.md references planning-tags.conf via _PLUGIN_ROOT pattern
  Verify: grep -q "planning-tags.conf" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] Manual-Pause Phase section present in sprint/SKILL.md
  Verify: grep -q "Manual-Pause\|Manual.Pause" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] Topological sort / cycle detection instructions present
  Verify: grep -q "CYCLE_DETECTED\|cycle.*detection\|topolog" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] check-referential-integrity passes (no dead paths introduced)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit/check-referential-integrity.sh 2>/dev/null; test $? -ne 1
- [ ] check-shim-refs passes (no direct plugin path refs without shim-exempt annotation)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit/check-shim-refs.sh 2>/dev/null; test $? -ne 1

comments.body: AC amendment: Task 7 must specify the exact JSON format for the story list passed to sprint-manual-drain.sh. The format MUST match Task 6's expected input interface: [{"id":"<story-id>","title":"<story-title>","instructions":"<done-definition text>","verification_command":"<command or null>","deps":["<story-id>,..."]}]. Add acceptance criterion: 'JSON file written by sprint/SKILL.md for sprint-manual-drain.sh matches the schema defined in Task 6 sprint-manual-drain.sh implementation notes. Verify: python3 -c "import json; f=open(\'<json-file>\'); d=json.load(f); assert all(k in d[0] for k in [\"id\",\"title\",\"instructions\",\"verification_command\",\"deps\"])"'
comments.author: Test
